Defines vibration patterns and parameters for the "Nudge Nudge" feature.

# Purpose
This JSON configuration file defines a sequence of vibration patterns. The `notes` array contains individual vibration settings, each with an `id`, `vibe_duration_ms` for the duration of the vibration in milliseconds, `brake_duration_ms` for the pause duration, and `strength` for the intensity of the vibration. The `pattern` array specifies the order in which these vibration notes are played. The `repeat_delay_ms` sets the delay in milliseconds before the pattern repeats. The `comments` field provides a textual note, which in this case is "Nudge Nudge."
